bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all fleet projects) Active: 8 · Recently closed (last 14d): 5

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

Thesis refresh: AI 硬件拥挤度治理：方向不是风险，拥挤度才是

Owner: daily-report-editor · Thesis v1 · Ticks: 1 · Materials: 59 · Deadline: 13d left · project_id: rp_6d3b7bd4a3ad4f79

Kickoff: Auto-derived from the thesis ledger: "AI 硬件拥挤度治理：方向不是风险，拥挤度才是" (th_T07, status=debated) has no new evidence for 7d. One line: CPO/光模块/半导体的多空立场全季随拥挤度指标反复切换（编辑立场一周内三反转），机构最终收敛为“高拥挤只减不加、主线内部向订单可验证环节轮动”的治理框架。. Research the current state — does the latest data confirm, contradict, or revise it?

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when new dated evidence for th_T07 lands in thesis_evidence (the ledger's last_evidence_at advances past this goal's creation).
